resource.name: Heat
resource.mechanic: Rises when Aerosmith casts abilities. At maximum, overheats temporarily, disabling basic abilities but empowering basic attacks.

quotes.selection: If I shoot you, you'll be nothing but Swiss cheese!
general: I'm gonna turn you into a sieve!
Once I decide to kill you, you're already dead!
I'll keep shooting until there's nothing left!
I'll find you no matter where you hide! I can smell your CO2!

8: Don't order me around! I'm not your underling!
5: I'll follow you to the end, Bucciarati!

passive.name: Overheat System
passive.description: Narancia's Heat bar rises every time Aerosmith casts an ability. Upon reaching maximum Heat, he overheats, temporarily disabling his basic abilities (0-4 seconds) but empowering his basic attacks with bonus critical strike chance and health-scaling damage. He also gains significant bonus attack speed.

passive.name: Carbon Dioxide Radar
passive.description: Aerosmith continuously detects nearby enemies by sensing their carbon dioxide emissions. Reveals all enemies within a set radius, including those in stealth or invisibility. Does not reveal wards or traps.

h1.name: Suppressive Fire
h1.description: Aerosmith switches to burst fire, shooting volleys of bullets. Number of volleys increases per rank. Each bullet's damage is increased based on critical strike chance. Volley size scales with Attack Speed.

h2.name: Aerial Bombing
h2.description: Narancia marks a target location. Aerosmith flies to that location and drops a bomb dealing physical damage in an area, slowing enemies for 1.25 seconds.

h3.name: Wide-Area Barrage
h3.description: Aerosmith switches to explosive rounds for a few seconds. Projectiles travel slower but gain +150 range. Each shot explodes in a small AoE dealing physical damage based on critical strike chance.

h4.name: Aerial Burn Run
h4.description: Narancia paints a long rectangular line. As bombs land, enemies struck take impact damage. The ground then burns for 5 seconds, dealing persistent physical damage per second to enemies in the zone and slowing them. Slow lingers 1 second after leaving.

impactDamage.scaling: 20% bonus AD + 0% - 50% (based on critical strike chance)
impactDamage.limitation: Each enemy hit at most once per cast

lore:
Narancia Ghirga is a member of Passione and one of the core members of Bruno Bucciarati's squad. He is energetic, impulsive, and often childish in his behavior, but beneath his rough attitude lies a deeply loyal and caring person who values his friends as family. Abandoned and betrayed at a young age, Narancia grew up with a strong sense of insecurity and anger, but joining Bucciarati's team gave him a place where he finally felt accepted and protected.

His Stand, Aerosmith, takes the form of a small fighter plane equipped with machine guns and missiles. It allows Narancia to track enemies by detecting their carbon dioxide emissions, making it highly effective for reconnaissance and surprise attacks. Despite its simple appearance, Aerosmith becomes a dangerous combat tool thanks to Narancia's instincts, determination, and willingness to throw himself into battle for his teammates.

Although he can appear immature and reckless, Narancia is extremely brave and emotionally sensitive. He develops a strong bond with the members of Bucciarati's group, especially seeing them as the family he never had. His loyalty to his friends and his desire to protect those who gave him a home become the driving forces behind his actions, making him one of the most heartfelt and tragic members of Giorno Giovanna's team.
